scripts.desktop:build: bun build src/main.ts --outfile dist/main.js --target=node --external electron && bun build src/preload.ts --outfile dist/preload.cjs --target=node --format=cjs --external electron && bun run browser-host:build
scripts.desktop:pack: bun run desktop:build && bun run desktop:prepare-runtime && electron-builder --dir
scripts.desktop:dist: bun run desktop:build && bun run desktop:prepare-runtime && electron-builder
scripts.desktop:test: bun run typecheck && bun test test/*.test.ts
scripts.dev: SYNERGY_DESKTOP_CHANNEL=dev bun run desktop:build && electron dist/main.js
scripts.test:runtime: bun run build && SYNERGY_DESKTOP_RUNTIME_TEST=1 bun test test/browser-runtime-smoke.test.ts
